title: PokeBadges [Cobblemon & Pixelmon Addon]
description: A complete Gym Badge system for Cobblemon. Store, manage and track your badges inside a dedicated Badge Box with immersive GUI and metadata support.
body:
PokeBadges

Modern Gym Badge System for Cobblemon & Pixelmon

✨ What is PokeBadges?

PokeBadges introduces a structured and modern Gym Badge progression system for Cobblemon and Pixelmon environments.

Instead of treating badges as simple collectible items, this mod provides a dedicated Badge Box with a clean interface, proper slot management and metadata support.

The goal is to modernize existing Pokémon server setups by offering a clean, expandable and immersive badge management system.

🧩 Features

  • Custom Badge Box item
  • Dedicated multi-region GUI with clean badge slot layouts
  • Supports 8 regions: Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, Sinnoh, Unova, Kalos, Galar and Paldea
  • Dynamic badge tooltips with region and progression info
  • Extended stored badge details: region, gym leader, gym type and obtained date
  • Metadata-based badge storage system
  • Badges are only registered once
  • Custom badge discovery popup when registering a new badge
  • Client config option to enable or disable discovery popups
  • Custom sound effects for key interactions
  • Keybind to open the Badge Box
  • Works from inventory, while held, or through an Accessories slot
  • Admin commands for giving and clearing badges
  • Designed for Cobblemon & Pixelmon servers and progression-based modpacks
  • Multiloader support: NeoForge + Fabric

🎯 Why This Mod?

Many existing Pokémon server setups rely on outdated or basic badge implementations. PokeBadges aims to provide a clean and future-proof foundation for structured badge progression.

🛠️ Server Tools

  • Admin commands to give or clear badges for players
  • Region-wide badge distribution support
  • Useful for events, progression syncing and staff management

🔔 Badge Discovery

  • Custom popup when a badge is registered for the first time
  • Client-side option to enable or disable discovery popups
  • Badges are only counted once to prevent duplicate registration issues

🌍 Supported Regions

PokeBadges currently includes badge support for: Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, Sinnoh, Unova, Kalos, Galar and Paldea.

💬 Community & Suggestions

Have ideas, suggestions or specific server needs?

Join the official Discord and share your feedback:

Join Our Story Discord

📦 Modpack Policy

You are free to include PokeBadges in public or private modpacks. Credit is appreciated but not required.
